title: Sophie Pardehpoosh
text: My name is Sophie Pardehpoosh and I am a fourth-year environmental studies student at UC Santa Barbara intending to graduate with my bachelors of science in June, 2026. I am currently taking ENV 193DS in which I am building my statistical knowledge, and learning how to use R. To demonstrate my coding skills, I have made this website.

title: Hempel Foundation Internship Write Up
text: Over the summer in 2025, I was able to do an internship with the Hempel Foundation in Copenhagen, Denmark. “The Hempel Foundation is a philanthropic foundation based in Denmark, with a strong commitment to creating a brighter future for people and the planet. Rooted in the legacy of J.C. Hempel, the founder of the Hempel Group, the Foundation supports initiatives within two main focus areas: Education and Biodiversity.” During my time, I was asked to research sustainable financing in Indonesia to help support decisions regarding funding and support for biodiversity conservation in Indonesia.
